message:
feat: unified overlap resolver with iteration budget

Replace the old 3-pass label-only collision avoidance with a unified
resolver that checks arrow labels against ALL element types:
- Other arrow labels (existing)
- Node shapes (NEW)
- Group boundaries — border strips only (NEW)
- Arrow segments — skips own arrow to avoid false positives (NEW)

Iterates until stable or budget (10 iterations) exhausted.
Offsets: 16 candidates (small nudge, medium, diagonal, large).

Also adds node overlap resolution for the grid fallback layout:
nudges nodes sharing the same cell apart by COL_SPACING.

Tests: 2 new tests (label-vs-node, grid overlap nudging).
Visual regression baseline updated for new label positions.
